sourcePrompt: An M35 "Deuce and a Half" six-wheel cargo truck, about six and a half meters long, sitting high on its axles. A round-fendered hooded cab with a flat split windshield leads; behind it a long cargo bed rides on the frame under arched bows carrying a canvas tarp roof. One axle under the cab, two close-set at the rear with big knobby tires, a stout front bumper, and a low tailgate. Olive-drab and canvas tan, broad and hard-working.
handEdit: windshield rebuilt as border frame + visible glass panes (glass was buried in a solid slab); steering wheel reoriented perpendicular to a floor-anchored column (was vertical disc twisted 45deg on Y, column missed the hub); offline rebake
